message:
Fix minimize_crossings regression + benchmark throughput accuracy

- minimize_crossings: when no sweep improves on the initial crossing
  count, the lazy-clone path returned the final (possibly worse)
  mutated ordering instead of the initial ordering. Fix: re-sort
  layers by node index to reconstruct the initial state cheaply.

- Benchmark throughput: diamond_dag(20) produces 12 nodes, not 20.
  Use actual node counts from ir.nodes.len() for accurate
  elements/sec reporting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
